{{Quote|Comrades, some two weeks ago the forces of Commander Skywalker engaged a large Imperial fleet near Bespin. The intended target was the ''Super''-class star destroyer ''Enforcer'', flagship of Admiral Kohrin and his second fleet.|Commander Fenris|<ref name="Class" />}}
The '''''Enforcer''''' was an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] and the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kohrin]] and his [[Admiral Kohrin's second fleet|second fleet]]. One of the grandest [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was damaged in a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[First attack on the Enforcer|ambush]] led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] near [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. The [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] underwent repairs above the Imperial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Phaylenn]] for two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] before finally being [[Second attack on the Enforcer|destroyed]] by Rebel forces under Commander [[Fenris]].

==Description==
The ''Enforcer'' was an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]]<ref name="Class" /> that served as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kohrin]]'s [[Admiral Kohrin's second fleet|second fleet]] and was considered to be one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] grandest [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. Although a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] designed to overcome an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] was no match for the ''Enforcer'', the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] could only operate as well as an Imperial after being badly damaged.<ref name="Challenge" />

==History==
{{Quote|While our Imperial friends are busy bombing us out of existence, ''Enforcer'' sits almost helpless above Phaylenn. Like a proverbial sitting duck. As you may have guessed, we have been ordered to head at once to Phaylenn and engage the ''Enforcer'' again. This time, she won't be as lucky as she was before.|Commander Fenris|<ref name="Class" />}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Enforcer'' was targeted by forces under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The ''Enforcer'' and its fleet, under the command of Admiral Kohrin, were [[First attack on the Enforcer|attacked]] by Skywalker's forces near [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] in an attempt to exterminate the Super [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. Imperial reinforcements arrived at the last moment and turned the tide of the battle in the Empire's favor, saving the ''Enforcer'' from destruction. Though Skywalker was forced to order his ships to withdraw, the ''Enforcer'' sustained considerable damage from the attack and made its way to an [[Phaylenn repair yard|orbital repair facility]] above the Imperial-held [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Phaylenn]].<ref name="Challenge" />

For the next two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], the ''Enforcer'' underwent extensive reconstruction at Phaylenn. Meanwhile, the rest of Kohrin's fleet joined Imperial forces in wiping out the Rebel presence in the [[Ahlenn system]]. However, the Rebels, who had already evacuated [[Ahlenn]] two [[Standard month/Legends|months]] prior, formulated a plan to finish off the defenseless ''Enforcer'' at Phaylenn. A fleet large enough to overwhelm an ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer, led by Alliance Commander [[Fenris]], soon [[Second attack on the Enforcer|engaged]] the ''Enforcer'' and a force of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] defending Phaylenn. The ''Enforcer'', only as functional as a typical Imperial Star Destroyer in its present condition,<ref name="Challenge" /> was easily destroyed by Fenris's fleet, and the resulting explosion obliterated Phaylenn's repair facility as well.<ref name="Challenge" />

==Commanders and crew==
The ''Enforcer'' was commanded by Admiral Kohrin during the Galactic Civil War, and served as Kohrin's flagship in his second fleet.<ref name="Challenge" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Phaylenn.jpg|thumb|right|A damaged Star Destroyer at Phaylenn]]
The ''Enforcer'' was created for the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|''Star Wars'' D6]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure "[[Starfighters Down]]" by [[William W. Connors]], published in the magazine [[Challenge 38|''Challenge'' 38]] in [[1989]]. Since the ''Enforcer'' was released outside the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Challenge" /> it is considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>

In the adventure, the players take on the roles of a group of Rebel [[operative]]s assigned to work with Fenris's fleet. During the battle above Phaylenn, the ship carrying the players is shot down and crashes on the surface of the planet. If the players' ship is large enough, the gamemaster has the option of allowing the ''Enforcer'' to be the ship that shoots it down. The adventure also features an illustration by artist [[Rick Harris]], depicting a battered Star Destroyer docked at a facility above Phaylenn. This illustration may have been intended to represent the ''Enforcer'', but since the image depicts a regular Star Destroyer as opposed to a Super Star Destroyer, this cannot be the case.<ref name="Challenge" />
